Tour.title: Tour
Tour.description: Represents a virtual tour with multiple scenes and hotspots.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tour entity.

name.description: The public name of the tour/property.

clientName.description: The private name of the client associated with this tour.

slug.description: A URL-friendly slug for the tour.

published.description: Indicates whether the tour is published and publicly accessible.

floorPlanUrl.description: URL of the floor plan image associated with the tour.

showFloorPlan.description: Indicates whether the floor plan should be visible in the public tour.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the thumbnail image for the tour.

address.description: The physical address of the property.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate for Google Maps location (Optional).

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate for Google Maps location (Optional).

Scene.title: Scene
Scene.description: Represents a 360° scene within a virtual tour.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Scene entity.

imageUrl.description: URL of the 360° image for the scene.

Hotspot.title: Hotspot
Hotspot.description: Represents a hotspot within a 360° scene that allows navigation to other scenes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Hotspot entity.

AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents an administrator user with access to the admin dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AdminUser entity.

isAdmin.description: Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SiteConfiguration entity.  Only one record should exist.

defaultLanguage.description: The default language for the site (e.g., 'es' for Spanish, 'en' for English').

definition.description: Stores site-wide configurations, such as the default language.  There should only be one document.

params.name: siteConfigurationId
params.description: The ID of the site configuration document. Only one such document is expected.

params.name: tourId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tour.

definition.description: Stores scene data associated with a specific tour.

params.name: tourId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tour.

params.name: sceneId
params.description: The unique identifier for the scene.

definition.description: Stores hotspot data associated with a specific scene.

params.name: tourId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tour.

params.name: sceneId
params.description: The unique identifier for the scene.

params.name: hotspotId
params.description: The unique identifier for the hotspot.

definition.description: Collection used to manage administrator roles. Document existence determines admin status.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Tour Weaver application, emphasizing security, scalability, and maintainability. It incorporates key principles such as Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and explicit Access Modeling.  Authorization Independence is achieved by avoiding `get()` calls in security rules, eliminating hierarchical authorization dependencies, and denormalizing authorization data when necessary. This design uses structural segregation to group data with similar access requirements into separate collections. Path-based ownership secures user-specific data, while a dedicated collection secures admin-only data. QAPs (Rules are not Filters) are supported by explicit segregation and membership models.

Specifically:

*   `siteConfigurations`: This collection holds site-wide configuration data, such as the default language. There will only be one record, so there is no possibility of filtering.
*   `tours`: Contains all tour documents. The `tours` collection stores metadata about each tour. This is a global collection readable by anyone.
*   `tours/{tourId}/scenes`: Contains all scene documents that belong to the tour. This is a subcollection under the tours collection.
*   `tours/{tourId}/scenes/{sceneId}/hotspots`: Contains all hotspot documents that belong to the scene. This is a subcollection under the scenes collection.
*   `roles_admin/{userId}`: Documents in this collection indicate admin privileges. Existence of a document grants admin access.

Tour creation, modification, and publishing are restricted to admins, enforced via the `roles_admin` collection. The site configuration is also restricted to admins.
